name: Microsoft
description: Microsoft is a technology company providing Windows, Office, Azure cloud services, Xbox, and enterprise software.

years.notes: Original hand-drawn 'Micro-Soft' stacked wordmark from the Paul Allen / Bill Gates era — pre-disco 'blibbet'. Wide horizontal mark scaled to fit 24×24; illegible at small icon sizes.
'Blibbet' logo — the O with horizontal lines. Wide wordmark scaled to fit 24×24; illegible at small icon sizes.
'Pacman' logo by Scott Baker — italic Microsoft wordmark with sliced O. The longest-lived Microsoft logo (1987–2012). Wide wordmark scaled to fit 24×24; illegible at small icon sizes.
Four colored squares (2012 rebrand under Jeff Hansen).
